## Summary

Describe the logical changes and their user, operator, or developer impact.

## Change records

- [ ] Every logical change has its own file in `changes/pending/`.
- [ ] A `type: none` exemption is used only when it includes a concrete reason.
- [ ] Public titles and descriptions are suitable for release notes and contain no confidential data.
- [ ] Breaking changes include actionable `upgrade_notes`.
- [ ] New virtual devices include both `vd.vendor` and `vd.platform`.
- [ ] I reviewed the changelog preview produced by the Change metadata workflow.

List the fragment IDs included in this pull request:

- `change-id`

## Verification

Describe the tests or checks performed for the code change itself.
